patch.value: tests/unit is at exactly 120/120 spec files: zero headroom before Gates(static) fails; consolidation candidates identified

ls tests/unit/*.spec.ts = 120, and static-quality-gate.mjs --max-files-per-dir defaults to 120, so the NEXT spec file added to tests/unit/ breaks CI Gates(static). Relates pm-wc0d (adds a contract test for the cap) but this is the remediation side: free headroom by consolidating duplicated coverage or moving specs into the existing tests/unit/commands/ + tests/unit/core/ subdirectories (each counted separately, far under cap). Verified consolidation candidate: the author-resolution fallback chain (explicit -> env -> settings -> unknown) is asserted end-to-end in at least 5 places: tests/unit/notes-learnings-command.spec.ts:119, tests/unit/comments-command.spec.ts:174, tests/unit/files-docs-command.spec.ts:331 and :824 (files + docs, via shared assertAuthorResolution). The chain could be unit-tested once against the core resolver, with command specs keeping only a single wiring assertion each.

value.note: Added beads runtime loader coverage in existing suite

Added todos runtime loader coverage in existing suite

value.author: lane-d-subagent-20260614
value.text: Evidence: Consolidated lane-specific duplicate specs into existing suites by deleting tests/unit/lane-b-package-runtime-coverage.spec.ts tests/unit/lane-b-scripts-coverage.spec.ts and tests/unit/lane-c-scripts-coverage.spec.ts. Added targeted runtime coverage to tests/unit/builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts for guide-shell linked-test-adapters and templates package command/runtime smoke and added runtime-loader candidate/error coverage in tests/unit/beads-command.spec.ts and tests/unit/todos-extension.spec.ts. Verification: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts tests/unit/beads-command.spec.ts tests/unit/todos-extension.spec.ts passed with 3 files and 63 tests in 24.86 seconds. node scripts/release/static-quality-gate.mjs --json returned ok true with no violations and max_files_per_dir gate satisfied. Expected efficiency impact: fewer duplicate suites and less redundant setup/import overhead while preserving package runtime coverage signal inside existing files.
